summary: Match flow state machine: character select, round management, HUD (bars.sp2), pre-fight overlays, attract/demo mode, post-battle results. Glue between menu and gameplay.
subsystems: Character select: cursor movement, locking picks, CPU/2P toggle
Pre-fight overlays: round display, blinking KO text, fade-to-black
Round management: health checks, win/loss/draw tracking, round counters
HUD: loads bars.sp2 health bar sprite
Attract/title: timeout-based demo mode with button skip
open_questions: line 202: obj->x_0f4167b4[1] overwritten with button state instead of decrement — is this a real bug or required-to-match?
What do the overlay parameter tables D_8004D604 and D_8004D744 look like?
